details: Amy Lynn Bradley, while on a family cruise to the Caribbean, went missing from the Royal Caribbean International Cruise Line’s ship Rhapsody of the Seas.  On Saturday, March 21, 1998, the vessel departed San Juan, Puerto Rico, and traveled to its first port of call, the island of Aruba.  On Monday, March 23, 1998, Rhapsody of the Seas departed Aruba and was traveling in international waters to its next island port of Curacao, Netherlands Antilles.  During the early morning hours of Tuesday, March 24, 1998, Amy Lynn Bradley went missing.  The vessel later departed Curacao and continued on to the island of St. Martin (Sint Maarten) and further traveled to St. Thomas, United States Virgin Islands, before returning to San Juan, Puerto Rico, on Saturday, March 28, 1998.
title: AMY LYNN BRADLEY

details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation’s Southern Maine Gang Task Force, and the Portland Police Department in Maine, are investigating the suspicious disappearance of Miguel Oliveras and are asking for the public’s assistance in locating him or his remains.  Oliveras, of Hyde Park, Massachusetts, was last seen around 1:00 a.m. on September 2, 2006, at the Platinum Plus Nightclub on Riverside Street in Portland, Maine.  At that time, he was wearing a gray camouflage long-sleeved shirt with a white t-shirt over it, green cargo shorts, and white sneakers.
title: MIGUEL OLIVERAS

details:
Sa'Wade Birdinground was last seen at her family's residence in Garryowen, Montana, within the boundaries of the Crow Indian Reservation, after approximately 11:00 p.m., on October 6, 2024. 

 

She was last seen wearing a black hoodie with mushrooms on it, an anime t-shirt, basketball shorts, and purple slip-on Skechers-brand shoes.  She may have a black and purple Adidas backpack with her.  She is known to wear an elk tooth necklace.
title: SA'WADE BIRDINGROUND

details: On December 20, 2023, Jennifer Suojanen was found murdered in her Port Richey, Florida, residence. Her husband, Sean Suojanen, is currently wanted in connection with this homicide. He was last seen on December 21, 2023, near Margaret Drive in Port Richey.  Anyone with information is asked to contact the Pasco County Sheriff’s Office.
title: SEAN SUOJANEN - HOMICIDE SUSPECT - PORT RICHEY, FLORIDA

details:
On September 30, 2000, Colleen Perris was last seen leaving her residence in Plantation, Florida. She had plans to accompany her parents to a baseball game later that day but never returned home. On October 6, 2000, her vehicle was recovered in the parking lot of a shopping center in Tamarac, Florida.


Perris has a butterfly tattoo on her lower back, a Chinese letter/symbol tattoo on her right ankle, and a band/bracelet tattoo on her left ankle. Her ears, navel, and tongue are pierced.


Anyone with information regarding Perris’s disappearance is asked to contact the Plantation Police Department.
title: COLLEEN ELIZABETH PERRIS - PLANTATION, FLORIDA

details:
Nicole McCartney was reported missing on December 3, 2022, in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, where she was last seen on the same day.  McCartney was wearing a dark-colored hooded sweatshirt at
the time and a pair of jeans. She has her left eyebrow pierced and multiple ear piercings.  She is also missing her molars.  Anyone with information on the whereabouts or disappearance of Nicole McCartney is asked to reach out to investigators.
title: NICOLE ELIZABETH MCCARTNEY - HARRISBURG, PENNSYLVANIA

details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation in Honolulu is seeking information regarding Abigail Bernstein and her two children, Kush Kohole Bernstein and Koa Kai Bernstein.  The family was last seen at Ala Wai Boat Harbor in Honolulu, Hawaii, in October of 2022.
title: KUSH KOHOLE BERNSTEIN

details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation in Honolulu is seeking information regarding Abigail Bernstein and her two children, Koa Kai Bernstein and Kush Kohole Bernstein.  The family was last seen at Ala Wai Boat Harbor in Honolulu, Hawaii, in October of 2022.
title: KOA KAI BERNSTEIN

details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation in Honolulu is seeking information regarding Abigail Bernstein and her two children, Koa Kai Bernstein and Kush Kohole Bernstein.  The family was last seen at Ala Wai Boat Harbor in Honolulu, Hawaii, in October of 2022.
title: ABIGAIL BERNSTEIN

details: On January 15, 1991, Sandra Carrera was found deceased in her townhome, in the Windgate neighborhood of Arlington, Virginia, at the bottom of her stairs. Carrera’s cause of death was a gunshot wound, and her case was ruled a homicide. Nothing in the home appeared to have been disturbed, and nothing was taken. Anyone with information regarding the homicide of Carrera is asked to contact investigators.
title: SANDRA BURT CARRERA - ARLINGTON, VIRGINIA

details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation in Colorado is seeking information regarding the death of Jeremiah Jake.  On May 22, 2022, a body was found on an island in the middle of the Animas River south of Durango, Colorado, within the exterior boundaries of the Southern Ute Indian Reservation. The body was identified as Jeremiah Jake, a 27-year-old Navajo tribal member from New Mexico, who had been reported missing in April of 2019.
title: JEREMIAH JAKE

details: The Federal Bureau of Investigation and Illinois State Police are seeking the public's assistance in identifying the individual(s) responsible for the disappearance and death of 7-year-old Dalton Mesarchik. Dalton was reported missing on March 26, 2003, after disappearing from the front yard of his home in Streator, Illinois. Dalton’s body was found the following day in the Vermillion River.
title: DALTON MESARCHIK

details: Jesus de la Cruz was last seen on September 28, 1996, walking on Park Street near his residence in Lynn, Massachusetts. He was six years old at the time of his disappearance and has not been seen since. De la Cruz has a scar above his left eye, birthmarks on his left calf and the left side of his forehead, and his left ear is pierced. He was last seen wearing a white t-shirt, blue jeans, and brown and yellow boots.
title: JESUS DE LA CRUZ - LYNN, MASSACHUSETTS

details:
Kenneth Fox was last heard from on April 1,1989, when he called his mother from a pay phone in Homestead, Florida. At the time of his disappearance, he was homeless and staying
in a wooded area. Records suggest that he may have traveled to Texas, Arizona, and California in the summer of 1991. He may have traveled to Georgia in 1997. Fox was originally from Lexington, Kentucky. His top or bottom front tooth is chipped. He was last known to be traveling by bicycle, on foot, or by hitchhiking.


Anyone with information is asked to contact the Homestead Police Department.
title: KENNETH EARL FOX - HOMESTEAD, FLORIDA
